_comment: Demo events the UI sends into the agent workflow. Event names map to entry points in app/agent.py. `plan_q3` is the main demo trigger; `resource_review` is the supporting beat; `decide_priority` is the per-item decision payload fired when the user clicks Prioritize/Deprioritize in the UI.

events.label: Plan Q3
events.description: Load the Q3 planning input (backlog + proposals) and surface the decision_required items with both agents' opening positions.
events.expected_output: A prioritization board state + per-item agent positions for BACKLOG-01, BACKLOG-02, Q3-ING-01.

events.label: Review Q1/Q2 resource trend
events.description: Summarize the Q1/Q2 utilization history and explain why Eng is pushing back on over-commitment.
events.expected_output: A short narrative: Q1 Ingestion peaked at 122% → 2 slips; Q2 rebalanced to 95% → clean ship; Q3 plan as-proposed would push 3 teams back over 100%.

events.label: Prioritize Circuit Breakers
events.description: User clicked Prioritize on BACKLOG-01 (Circuit Breakers). Both agents emit their take; workflow pauses for human confirm.
events.expected_output: Stakeholder agrees (protects renewal). Planning flags the Delivery capacity risk and asks for a scope reduction or a deferred ship week. Human confirms or revises.

events.label: Deprioritize Circuit Breakers
events.expected_output: Planning agrees (frees Delivery for Signatures v2). Stakeholder objects — cites the customer reliability complaint and asks to revisit in Q4. Human confirms.

events.label: Prioritize Ingestion debt remnant
events.description: User clicked Prioritize on BACKLOG-02 (Ingestion debt remnant). Role-reversal beat — here the Stakeholder is the one resisting.
events.expected_output: Planning insists (prevents a Q1 repeat before Regional EU). Stakeholder pushes back (no customer voice; spend the capacity on Q3-ING-01 revenue instead). Human confirms.

events.label: Defer Regional Ingestion EU (partial)
events.description: User clicked the Planning Agent's proposed compromise on Q3-ING-01: ship the EU endpoint, defer routing rules + Frankfurt PoP to Q4.
events.expected_output: Stakeholder accepts (keeps the prospect commitment viable). Planning confirms it fits the capacity envelope. Human confirms.
